reasoning: The Lean formalization captures the informal statement using standard Mathlib encodings: `CommRing R` + `IsDomain R` corresponds to "integral domain"; `MvPolynomial (Fin 2) R` with `X 0` and `X 1` corresponds to `R[x,y]`; `span {X 0 ^ i - X 1 ^ j}` is the ideal `(x^i - y^j)`; `Nat.Coprime i j` (i.e., `gcd i j = 1`) is "relatively prime"; and `.IsPrime` is "prime ideal".
